privileged_info_summary: Task is to create a flight operation named 'Rajasthan Corridor Inspection' in Aerobridge (Django-based drone fleet management system) accessed via admin panel at http://localhost:8000/admin/. Default admin credentials are username 'admin' and password 'adminpass123'. The task environment uses synthetic fixture data including pre-loaded aircraft ('F1 #1', 'F1 #2'), flight plans, operators, and pilots. Task verifies success by checking that a flight operation with the exact name 'Rajasthan Corridor Inspection' was created in the database.
